channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: TCL now can't call some of its TVs 'QLED' after losing in court to Samsung — and there are more legal cases coming
item.description: A German court has ordered TCL to cease advertising and selling QLED TVs in the country, and US cases are looming too

item.title: Qualcomm reveals its super-powered Raspberry Pi competitor, promising AI power which will be 'enabling systems that don’t just interpret the world — they interact with it'
item.description: Arduino VENTUNO Q delivers offline AI, robotics control, and vision systems on a single board with local computation capabilities.

item.title: What is the release date for Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 3 on CBS and Paramount+?
item.description: I'm not sure if fans are enjoying Yellowstone's latest spinoff any more after episode 2, but when does Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 3 hit CBS and Paramount+?

item.title: Disney World’s Buzz Lightyear Space Ranger Spin is reopening with new blasters, animatronics, and targets — and that's just the start
item.description: Disney World has revealed that Buzz Lightyear’s Space Ranger Spin will reopen on April 8 with upgraded ride tech, kicking off a summer of new shows, refreshed attractions, and park deals.

item.title: Viral hit Your AI Slop Bores Me is more than a joke
item.description: The website "Your AI Slop Bores Me" has touched a nerve -- now it is getting upgraded by its human creator.

item.title: The best power banks of 2026 in Australia: top portable chargers from Anker, ZMI, INIU and more
item.description: Here are the best power banks, whether you're after a slim portable charger for a phone or a large bank to juice up a laptop.
